text: Welcome back to 100 days of code Today I want to tell you a story of my personal life When I was in my second year of college, I knew C C++ very well I was coding, I knew coding, I knew HTML But I was not able to work in the industry in any way Maybe I was not getting any C C++ project Now I am not saying that C C++ is a bad programming language I have made many conditional related programs with the help of C++ I have done many other things, made great calculators But I was not able to work in the industry in any way When I was introduced to Python, I did web scrapping, made GUIs, made applications for Flask I did a lot of freelancing And I consider Python as a language that actually taught me the use of programming Why do we give so much value to programming in the industry? And why is programming used so much in the industry? In today's video, I am going to show you some programs that you will enjoy watching You will also say that it is fun to watch these programs Because after watching these programs, you will understand the actual use of programming Programming is used I will tell you about 5 programs today And you will also enjoy watching these 5 programs Some of them are very amazing games There is a Jarvis virtual assistant that runs on your map It shows you what you say and what commands you give The biggest reason to make this course is that there are many new things in Python There are many new approaches that I want to tell you And this brand new course will touch all those things For example, Valorous operator has come in Python There are many other additions There are many easy ways to do things So we will cover all these things in this course I will teach you Python so well The way a snake runs on its map You will be able to run Python on your map while programming You can do whatever you want So let's go to the showcase And I will show you my programs Which I made with the help of Python Let's get started So the first program I want to show you is Jarvis virtual assistant What does this program do? It takes your commands and after taking your commands It does some work and shows As you can see, it has opened YouTube So it is a very cool program You give it a command and it basically completes the task The next program I want to show you is our love calculator It is a very amazing calculator Which tells how much love there is between two people Now obviously, it will not tell accurately How much love there is between you and your partner So you all know But in a fun way, we made this program using a random module In which if we put two names Then it will tell the love percentage That how much love there is between two people So let's try it out So I will put Harry in the name And I will put Payal in the name of my partner I will calculate 97% Okay, great Now after this, if I write here Let's say I write Sanskriti here So 03 comes here I wrote 3% This means I should stay away from girls named Sanskriti Boys named Harry Okay, so this is a very fun calculator I hope you will enjoy running it The next program I want to show you This is a face recognition program Which uses the Harkascade algorithm Basically, it tells in an image Where is the face Where is the face This is a face detection algorithm So here you see In Robert Downey Jr's face It will tell where the actual face is hidden In the picture, it will tell where the face is hidden So I run it for 1.jpg file You can run it on your favorite file So see I run it here And after running You see it has detected all the faces from this image So I can run it for different images It is not necessary that it will work for one image It is working for different images It was a very fun program It was fun to make it Our next project is Flappy Bird game Which may be someone There may be someone who has not played this game Basically it is a very good game We play a lot on our phones But here in your computer You can play a fresh game made by your hands Flappy Bird I can play it Now see I am playing it here And it will be fun to play it You see here So fifth Last but not the least I have made many other projects But this is something I want to showcase How to make a snake game in Python I will play this game and show you As you can see This is our black snake This is the red food Yes, I know it can be done better By changing the image But here I made logic And see I am playing it I will break the high score of 90 I can make a lot of scores I will tell you I am a very dangerous hardcore gamer You can see here The score is 90 I don't want to get out No I don't want to get out Yes, I made a score of 100 I enjoy it Playing a game made by your hands Is something else I just want to tell you So in the coming videos We are going to do something like this I will tell you And you will enjoy a lot Because we will not make only these projects We will make many such projects In which we will be converting our ideas Into reality Now all these codes I am going to give you I want you to Run all these codes in
